records.question: Which departments are located in Linderman with a budget of at most 601283.6, where instructor Desyl earns exactly 48803.38 and student Porter has at most 111 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE student.name = 'Porter' AND instructor.salary = 48803.38 AND department.building = 'Linderman' AND department.budget <= 601283.6 AND instructor.name = 'Desyl' AND student.tot_cred <= 111
records.pred_sql: select t1.dept_name from department as t1 inner join instructor as t2 on t1.dept_name = t2.dept_name inner join student as t3 on t1.dept_name = t3.dept_name where t1.building = 'Linderman' and t1.budget <= 601283.6 and t2.name = 'Desyl' and t2.salary = 48803.38 and t3.name = 'Porter' and t3.tot_cred <= 111 limit 5
records.thought: I need to find departments based on their building and budget, and also filter by an instructor's name and salary, and a student's name and total credits. This requires joining `department` with `instructor` and `student` tables.

records.question: Which departments are located in the Saucon building and have an instructor named Lembr teaching the 4-credit course titled Quantum Mechanics, with students having at most 113 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE instructor.name = 'Lembr' AND course.credits = 4 AND course.title = 'Quantum Mechanics' AND department.building = 'Saucon' AND student.tot_cred <= 113
records.pred_sql: select t1.dept_name from department as t1 inner join instructor as t2 on t1.dept_name = t2.dept_name inner join teaches as t3 on t2.ID = t3.ID inner join course as t4 on t3.course_id = t4.course_id inner join takes as t5 on t4.course_id = t5.course_id and t3.sec_id = t5.sec_id and t3.semester = t5.semester and t3.year = t5.year inner join student as t6 on t5.ID = t6.ID where t1.building = 'Saucon' and t2.name = 'Lembr' and t4.title = 'Quantum Mechanics' and t4.credits = 4 and t6.tot_cred <= 113 limit 5
records.thought: I need to join department, instructor, teaches, course, takes, and student tables to filter by building, instructor name, course title, course credits, and student total credits.

records.question: Which departments have a budget of 276527.61, are located in the Main building, and have related course and instructor records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
WHERE department.budget = 276527.61 AND department.building = 'Main'
